revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-3-410

High current density arc lamp with carbon electrodes containing other substances which, volatilizing in the flame, contribute to the radiation so that the spectral distribution is altered or the luminous efficacy improved.

Reference: C.I.E.


{{IALAFooter}}
